title: Headroom: The Netflix Tool That Makes AI Agents 10x Cheaper
summary: Headroom is an open-source tool that compresses AI agent inputs including tool outputs, code files, and RAG results before reaching the LLM, reducing token usage by 60-95%. It uses content-type-aware compressors and a locally trained Kompress-based model, storing breadcrumb hashes to retrieve full original content on demand.
